top_claims.claim: Interactive Brokers reported strong June 2026 metrics with 34% year-over-year growth in customer accounts to 5.185 million, 40% increase in client equity to $930.3 billion, and 53% surge in trading volume. The company also saw margin loan balances jump 67% to $108.5 billion. Q1 2026 revenues grew 17% to $1.67 billion....

inflection_claims.claim: Interactive Brokers reported strong June 2026 metrics with 34% year-over-year growth in customer accounts to 5.185 million, 40% increase in client equity to $930.3 billion, and 53% surge in trading volume. The company also saw margin loan balances jump 67% to $108.5 billion. Q1 2026 revenues grew 17% to $1.67 billion....
